articles.title: Conan O’Brien to deliver Harvard’s commencement address
articles.description:
The Brookline native and Harvard alum will speak to graduates May 28 and receive an honorary degree.

The post Conan O’Brien to deliver Harvard’s commencement address appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Conan O’Brien will deliver Harvard's commencement address on May 28.
The Brookline native and Harvard alum will also receive an honorary degree.
Local graduates will hear from a prominent figure in entertainment and comedy.

articles.title: Britney Spears arrested and released, California sheriff’s records show, though charge is not clear
articles.description:
Spears was arrested around 9:30 p.m. in Ventura County and released on Thursday, sheriff's office records show.

The post Britney Spears arrested and released, California sheriff’s records show, though charge is not clear appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Britney Spears was arrested in Ventura County at 9:30 p.m. on Thursday.
Details of the charge against Spears remain unclear as of now.
Local Boston residents may feel concerned about celebrity legal issues affecting public perception.

articles.title: ‘What do they have up their sleeve?’: Ian Rapoport forecasts ‘fascinating’ Patriots offseason
articles.description:
"I would say what the New England Patriots have in store for us over the next week is going to be really fascinating."

summary: Ian Rapoport predicts an intriguing offseason for the New England Patriots starting next week.
Patriots' decisions could significantly affect their roster and performance for the upcoming season.
Local fans are eager to see how these changes will impact ticket sales and team dynamics.

articles.title: Watch Stephen Colbert and Steve Carell auction off props from ‘Late Show’ set before cancellation
articles.description:
Steve Carell joined longtime friend Stephen Colbert on 'The Late Show' to auction off items from the set before the show ends in May.

summary: Stephen Colbert and Steve Carell auctioned 'Late Show' props before its May cancellation.
The auction features memorabilia from the show's set, appealing to local fans.
Proceeds may support local charities, benefiting Boston communities.

articles.title: Boston Fleet sell out first PWHL game at TD Garden on April 11
articles.description:
“Boston is the ultimate sports city, and seeing this kind of support shows that women’s professional sports belong on the biggest stages.”

The post Boston Fleet sell out first PWHL game at TD Garden on April 11 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston Fleet sold out their inaugural PWHL game at TD Garden on April 11.
The event highlights Boston's strong support for women's professional sports.
Local businesses expect increased revenue from the sold-out crowd at the arena.

articles.title: Patriots will pick later in the first round than in recent drafts, but they still sit in a great spot
articles.description:
After years of high first-round selections following losing seasons, the New England Patriots now face a new reality — picking 31st in the upcoming NFL Draft.

The post Patriots will pick later in the first round than in recent drafts, but they still sit in a great spot appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots will select 31st in the 2026 NFL Draft, marking a shift in strategy.
This is their lowest first-round pick since recent years of rebuilding.
Local fans anticipate a focus on talent development rather than immediate roster overhaul.

articles.title: Suspect in custody in Colorado in the case of 3 women found dead in Utah
articles.description:
There is no indication that the suspect had any connection to the victims, authorities said.

The post Suspect in custody in Colorado in the case of 3 women found dead in Utah appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Suspect arrested in Colorado related to three women found dead in Utah.
Authorities confirmed no connection between the suspect and the victims.
Boston residents remain vigilant as investigations continue in related cases.
